description_long: This is a single-story residential house surrounded by a tall, dense hedge that forms a rectangular boundary around the property. The house features a dark, hipped roof with a prominent overhang, and a small covered porch at the front entryway. A driveway leads up to the house, with a red car parked beside the entrance, and a black metal gate and fence marking the front boundary. The yard is landscaped with a large tree and some grass, providing shade and privacy. Windows are visible on the front and side, but are limited in number and appear to be modest in size. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on privacy and security.
description: A single-story house with a dark hipped roof, surrounded by a tall hedge, featuring a driveway, front porch, and a black metal gate. The property includes a large tree and a red car parked beside the entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, red car, and black metal gate with the hedge boundary.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the house, dense hedge, and large tree, with minimal visible windows or entry points.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the sloped roof, hedge, and grassy yard area, with the tree partially visible in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, hedge enclosure, and the tree near the back corner.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a single front door, small steps, and a simple overhang, accessed via a driveway and black metal gate.
